title: Default research run mock staged-spine path
problem: Bare `research run --topic --domain` returns not_implemented (exit 2) after 360 tickets. The advertised entry command is unusable without knowing --fixture-mode or --staged-spine flags.
acceptance_criteria: Bare `research run --topic --domain` runs mock staged-spine orchestrator (exit 0 on temp --db with patched network).
`--fixture-mode` without `--staged-spine` still runs full fixture MVP pipeline.
GT26 golden test updated; golden + full pytest pass in mock mode.
non_goals: Live OpenAlex without mock network patches in CI.
rollback_plan: Restore not_implemented guard in _cmd_run and GT26 bare-run test.
